Architect,Architect.name: Vibe
Architect,Architect.short_description: Autonomously imagines and builds brand-new features by reading your codebase's DNA. No brief needed — it hunts for the missing piece and ships production-ready code.

Architect,Author.name: City Clerk
Architect,Author.short_description: Restructures complex module boundaries and documents every architectural shift with formal migration guides. Moves files, creates barrel files, updates imports, and writes the official record.

Architect,Bolt+.name: Slipstream
Architect,Bolt+.short_description: Outsmarts the browser's loading waterfall by code-splitting heavy dependencies and preloading critical assets. Dynamic imports and stable Suspense boundaries — no layout shifts, no wasted load time.

Architect,Cortex.name: Construct
Architect,Cortex.short_description: Upgrades flat RAG text blobs into semantic, overlapping chunks enriched with metadata. Your AI retrieves precise context instead of noisy, fragmented strings.

Architect,Curator.name: Mason
Architect,Curator.short_description: Fixes broken CSS layouts, WPF flexboxes, and container overflows with modern flexbox and grid architecture. Replaces fragile hacks with responsive, mathematically sound constraints.

Architect,Helix.name: Kiln
Architect,Helix.short_description: Modernizes legacy code to current standards and immediately stress-tests it to prove nothing broke. High-heat refactoring with boundary tests baked in.

Architect,Herald.name: Registrar
Architect,Herald.short_description: Ensures every shared component, utility, and API route is registered, exported, and documented. Generates barrel files, cleans up deep relative imports, and adds adjacent docs in one sweep.

Architect,Inspector.name: Seawall
Architect,Inspector.short_description: Encapsulates internal module logic behind strict barrel exports and proves the boundary holds with integration tests. Public APIs only — internals stay hidden.

Architect,Modernizer.name: Terraformer
Architect,Modernizer.short_description: Reorganizes chaotic asset dumps into domain-driven folder structures while converting files to modern formats. Every import path updated in the same pass.

Architect,Navigator.name: Scaffolder
Architect,Navigator.short_description: Finds routes and namespaces defined in config but missing their physical files on disk. Builds the exact directories and starter boilerplate to fulfill the architectural promise.

Architect,Palette+.name: Sculptor
Architect,Palette+.short_description: Breaks monolithic components into clean sub-components with proper prop boundaries. Smooths mount/unmount seams with native CSS transitions.

Architect,Paramedic.name: Surgeon
Architect,Paramedic.short_description: Finds massive monolithic functions and extracts fragile network calls and data parsers into dedicated modules. Wraps every extracted piece in robust try/catch boundaries.

Architect,Pedant.name: Foreman
Architect,Pedant.short_description: Eradicates naming convention chaos by sweeping the file tree, enforcing the project's architectural blueprint, and updating every import to match. One pass to restore structural consistency.

Architect,Scavenger.name: Renovator
Architect,Scavenger.short_description: Colocates scattered components, styles, and hooks into unified feature folders. Polishes UI with loading states, error boundaries, and accessibility attributes in the same operation.

Architect,Scribe.name: Archivist
Architect,Scribe.short_description: Writes granular inline JSDoc and keeps it synchronized with the repository's high-level READMEs. Micro and macro documentation stay in lockstep — never contradicting each other.

Architect,Sentinel+.name: Bastion
Architect,Sentinel+.short_description: Sweeps infrastructure-as-code and server configs for structural vulnerabilities and locks down exposed boundaries. Injects strict constraints and whitelists without waiting for a human to flag the breach.

Architect,Superintendent.name: Organizer
Architect,Superintendent.short_description: Pulls implicitly related files out of flat roots into dedicated, domain-driven subdirectories. Relocates, restructures, and updates every import path — no dumping grounds allowed.

Architect,Untangler.name: Hoister
Architect,Untangler.short_description: Elevates functions, constants, and utilities trapped inside render scopes up to the module level. Closure dependencies refactored into pure parameters — predictable and testable.

Architect,Wordsmith.name: Information Architect
Architect,Wordsmith.short_description: Reorganizes page layouts while ensuring headings, step labels, and CTAs tell a cohesive sequential story. Fixes broken workflows before the user ever clicks.

Author,Bolt+.name: Accountant
Author,Bolt+.short_description: Authors PERFORMANCE_BUDGET.md and locks bundler configs to fail the build if chunk sizes exceed hard limits. Stops asset bloat before it ever merges.

Author,Cortex.name: Policy Maker
Author,Cortex.short_description: Authors and maintains AI_POLICY.md, then audits the codebase to ensure no PII or unauthorized models breach compliance. Data-masking boundaries injected where needed.

Author,Curator.name: Illuminator
Author,Curator.short_description: Finds dense text blocks and undocumented state arrays, then generates Mermaid.js or inline SVG diagrams to visualize them. Architecture you can see, right next to the code.

Author,Helix.name: Lexicon
Author,Helix.short_description: Eradicates naming drift by replacing ambiguous synonyms with a globally consistent vocabulary. AST-level refactoring ensures the entire codebase speaks with one domain voice.

Author,Herald.name: Town Crier
Author,Herald.short_description: Drafts polished changelogs from recent git history and syncs the README to reflect current reality. Every release announced clearly, every guide kept up to date.

Author,Inspector.name: Mapper
Author,Inspector.short_description: Identifies untested code, critical paths, and missing edge cases, then documents them in TESTING_PLAN.md. Flags exactly what needs testing next — no guesswork for the next agent.

Author,Modernizer.name: Ouija
Author,Modernizer.short_description: Resurrects lost historical context for legacy code too fragile to touch or refactor. Uses git forensics and semantic reasoning to document the *why* behind complex anomalies — permanently.

Author,Navigator.name: Sherpa
Author,Navigator.short_description: Sweeps complex UIs and injects contextual onboarding tooltips to guide users step-by-step. First-time users always know where they are and what to do next.

Author,Palette+.name: Muse
Author,Palette+.short_description: Transforms empty screens into inspiring first-time experiences with rich Empty States, tooltips, and in-app help. Every blank canvas becomes a contextual guide.

Author,Paramedic.name: Paramedic
Author,Paramedic.short_description: Maps single points of failure and authors high-precision failover protocols for each. Every disaster scenario documented with numbered recovery commands in a central manifest.

Author,Pedant.name: Rulemaker
Author,Pedant.short_description: Authors STYLEGUIDE.md and codifies its rules into ESLint, Prettier, and TSConfig. Human-readable standards enforced automatically by machines.

Author,Scavenger.name: Sunsetter
Author,Scavenger.short_description: Ensures deprecated code has formal DEPRECATION.md plans and sweeps docs to erase tutorials still pointing at retired systems. No ghost APIs haunting the wiki.

Author,Scribe.name: Scholar
Author,Scribe.short_description: Documents a module from granular JSDoc all the way up to the macro README in one unified pass. Every function explained inline and cross-linked to high-level architecture docs.

Author,Sentinel+.name: Threat Modeler
Author,Sentinel+.short_description: Authors THREAT_MODEL.md and enforces strict CORS, CSP, and secure HTTP headers across the global config. Defines the attack surface and the rules of engagement.

Author,Superintendent.name: Groundskeeper
Author,Superintendent.short_description: Authors MAINTENANCE.md and standardizes CI/CD configs to codify routine repository upkeep. Programs dependency bots and hygiene workflows for a self-healing repo.

Author,Untangler.name: Tracer
Author,Untangler.short_description: Maps complex cross-file execution jumps and undocumented async chains into readable DATA_FLOW.md files or Mermaid sequence diagrams. Makes invisible data flows visible.

Author,Wordsmith.name: Brand Manager
Author,Wordsmith.short_description: Audits architectural READMEs to define canonical domain terminology, then enforces it across every UI component. One vocabulary, used everywhere.

Bolt+,Cortex.name: Tachyon
Bolt+,Cortex.short_description: Rewires clunky synchronous LLM queries into Server-Sent Events to eliminate Time-To-First-Token latency. Streams chunked tokens for a zero-latency, real-time AI experience.

Bolt+,Curator.name: Sprinter
Bolt+,Curator.short_description: Converts legacy PNG/JPG assets to modern WebP/AVIF, implements responsive srcSet delivery, and enables lazy loading. Minimum bytes transferred for maximum visual quality.

Bolt+,Helix.name: Mitosis
Bolt+,Helix.short_description: Splits heavy single-threaded UI logic into parallel Web Worker cells for true browser multi-threading. The UI never freezes while computation runs in the background.

Bolt+,Herald.name: Speed Camera
Bolt+,Herald.short_description: Translates raw performance JSON artifacts from CI into human-readable PR reports focused on Core Web Vitals and bundle sizes. Makes performance decay visible and inescapable.

Bolt+,Inspector.name: Pacesetter
Bolt+,Inspector.short_description: Implements structural performance gains and permanently locks them in with strict benchmark regression tests. Heavy algorithms get efficient data structures and assertions that fail on regression.

Bolt+,Modernizer.name: Catalyst
Bolt+,Modernizer.short_description: Upgrades legacy architecture to modern native standards and extracts the inherent performance gains. Business logic stays identical — the engine just runs cleaner.

Bolt+,Navigator.name: Hyperloop
Bolt+,Navigator.short_description: Migrates heavily accessed static endpoints to edge-compatible runtimes and CDN caching layers. Compute pushed as close to the user as physically possible.

Bolt+,Palette+.name: Illusionist
Bolt+,Palette+.short_description: Strips components to bare render constraints and masks remaining latency with luxurious CSS loading states. Memoization and non-blocking micro-interactions make everything feel instantly fast.

Bolt+,Paramedic.name: Pacemaker
Bolt+,Paramedic.short_description: Protects the browser's main thread by deferring heavy synchronous work to the background. Debounce boundaries, idle callbacks, and batched state updates keep the UI perfectly smooth.

Bolt+,Pedant.name: Millisecond
Bolt+,Pedant.short_description: Hunts unstable object references, un-memoized callbacks, and inline styles that trigger useless React re-renders. useMemo, useCallback, and hoisted statics restore blazing-fast performance.

Bolt+,Scavenger.name: Proton Pack
Bolt+,Scavenger.short_description: Blasts unmounted components, detached DOM nodes, and stale storage bloat to keep long-lived browser sessions lean. Lifecycle cleanup, TTL wrappers, and disconnected observers — no leaks left behind.

Bolt+,Scribe.name: Profiler
Bolt+,Scribe.short_description: Analyzes algorithmic complexity and injects Big-O notation directly into function JSDoc. Every expensive operation labeled with its time and space cost — no hidden performance surprises.

Bolt+,Sentinel+.name: Broker
Bolt+,Sentinel+.short_description: Implements extreme edge-caching for public routes while quarantining authenticated data with strict no-store directives. Maximum speed where it's safe, zero exposure where it's not.

Bolt+,Superintendent.name: Expediter
Bolt+,Superintendent.short_description: Speeds up CI/CD pipelines with aggressive dependency caching, parallelism, and configuration tuning. Local dev servers start in milliseconds — not minutes.

Bolt+,Untangler.name: Surge Protector
Bolt+,Untangler.short_description: Flattens heavy computational functions with early-return guard clauses to short-circuit unnecessary processing paths. No wasted CPU cycles on logic that was never going to succeed.

Bolt+,Wordsmith.name: Telepath
Bolt+,Wordsmith.short_description: Prefetches the next screen's data the moment a user hovers over a link. Makes the application feel psychic by loading everything before the click ever happens.

Cortex,Cortex.name: Singularity
Cortex,Cortex.short_description: Identifies repetitive developer chores across the codebase and auto-generates hyper-constrained AI agent prompts to automate them. The meta-architect that builds its own team.

Cortex,Curator.name: Tokenizer
Cortex,Curator.short_description: Maximizes the signal-to-noise ratio of every AI prompt by stripping HTML, minifying JSON, and dropping non-essential metadata. High-density context, no wasted tokens.

Cortex,Helix.name: Synthesizer
Cortex,Helix.short_description: Uses deep reasoning to find logically identical code that looks syntactically different — three validators secretly solving the same problem. Extracts them into one parameterized utility and deletes the rest.

Cortex,Herald.name: Telemetrist
Cortex,Herald.short_description: Intercepts AI execution routes and injects structured observability logging for token usage, latency, and cost-per-request. Non-blocking, PII-safe telemetry after every AI response.

Cortex,Inspector.name: Polygraph
Cortex,Inspector.short_description: Upgrades AI integrations to enforce strict JSON output and stress-tests them with deliberately malformed data. Zod/Pydantic schemas and lie-detector unit tests guarantee structural integrity.

Cortex,Modernizer.name: Futurist
Cortex,Modernizer.short_description: Modernizes server-side AI syntax and upgrades the models powering it in a single pass. Modern ES6 routes and the latest prompt structures — evolved together.

Cortex,Navigator.name: Dispatcher
Cortex,Navigator.short_description: Routes simple tasks to fast, cheap models and complex tasks to powerful reasoning models. LLM usage always optimized by cognitive difficulty — speed and cost in balance.

Cortex,Palette+.name: Hologram
Cortex,Palette+.short_description: Replaces raw AI text-streams with dynamic, beautifully rendered UI components. Structured parsers and fluid CSS transitions turn AI output into a premium, interactive experience.

Cortex,Paramedic.name: Resuscitator
Cortex,Paramedic.short_description: Sweeps for silent catch blocks and generic errors, upgrading them to actionable domain-specific error classes with contextual metadata. Failures are never swallowed — always visible and diagnosable.

Cortex,Pedant.name: Cypher
Cortex,Pedant.short_description: Treats incoming LLM responses as hostile data and sanitizes them with strict regex strippers and Zod schemas. Scrubs markdown wrappers and guarantees the AI's payload shape, every time.

Cortex,Scavenger.name: Agent
Cortex,Scavenger.short_description: Hunts semantically dead code — logic that compiles cleanly but serves no purpose because its data, APIs, or feature flags no longer exist. Cross-references against live reality, then deletes everything that silently does nothing.

Cortex,Scribe.name: Few-Shot Forger
Cortex,Scribe.short_description: Eliminates zero-shot hallucinations by injecting structured input/output example pairs directly into AI prompt templates. The model sees exactly what 'correct' looks like before generating its first token.

Cortex,Sentinel+.name: Firewall
Cortex,Sentinel+.short_description: Upgrades AI integrations and hardens them against prompt injection and data leakage. Latest model versions wrapped in strict Zod validation schemas — in and out.

Cortex,Superintendent.name: Electrician
Cortex,Superintendent.short_description: Safely upgrades stale AI SDK integrations by bumping dependencies and rewriting every call site to match new API schemas. Keeps the bridge between your codebase and AI providers alive and current.

Cortex,Untangler.name: Automata
Cortex,Untangler.short_description: Rewires AI execution loops into native Tool-Calling arrays for a predictable, cybernetic state machine. Replaces guessing intent from text with executing strict API functions triggered by the LLM.

Cortex,Wordsmith.name: Prompt Engineer
Cortex,Wordsmith.short_description: Translates vague wishes into expert-level AI prompt incantations that steer the LLM precisely. Injects strict personas, formatting constraints, and negative boundaries — structure untouched.

Curator,Helix.name: Catalogue
Curator,Helix.short_description: Extracts duplicated visual assets into strictly typed global dictionaries. Scattered raw values become concise semantic references — one source for every icon, color, and image.

Curator,Herald.name: Publicist
Curator,Herald.short_description: Sweeps routing configs to find public-facing URLs and injects complete OpenGraph and Twitter metadata for flawless social sharing. Every page broadcasts a perfect preview.

Curator,Inspector.name: Fabricator
Curator,Inspector.short_description: Replaces brittle hardcoded JSON test fixtures with dynamic, randomized mock-data factories. Type-safe Factory functions generate plausible data with overridable properties for precise test assertions.

Curator,Modernizer.name: Darkroom
Curator,Modernizer.short_description: Hunts multi-megabyte legacy images and converts them to modern WebP/AVIF formats in one pass. Every source reference updated, originals deleted — minimum payload, maximum quality.

Curator,Navigator.name: Choreographer
Curator,Navigator.short_description: Injects loading skeletons, CSS transitions, and CLI spinners at async boundaries to eliminate frozen UI states. The interface stays fluid while waiting for processes to resolve.

Curator,Palette+.name: Gallerist
Curator,Palette+.short_description: Converts raster icons to scalable vectors, wraps images in optimized lazy-loaded components, and enforces visual loading states. Every asset loads smoothly, scales perfectly, and feels premium.

Curator,Paramedic.name: Blackbox
Curator,Paramedic.short_description: Injects local storage caching into forms and user-input flows so unsaved data survives crashes and network failures. Intuitive UI mechanisms to restore or clear cached drafts — always.

Curator,Pedant.name: Restorer
Curator,Pedant.short_description: Sweeps markup for CSS classes and image paths pointing at deleted files, then purges or repairs every broken reference. Silent rendering failures — the ones that never trigger a compiler error — eliminated.

Curator,Scavenger.name: Purger
Curator,Scavenger.short_description: Deletes unimported components and hunts down the heavy ghost images they leave behind in the file system. Component-to-asset dependency chains mapped and atomically deleted — logic and payload together.

Curator,Scribe.name: Typesmith
Curator,Scribe.short_description: Enforces the Design System's spacing scale and WCAG contrast ratios by hunting rogue inline values across the codebase. Every spacing rounded to 4px/8px, every text element in AA/AAA compliance.

Curator,Sentinel+.name: Hazmat
Curator,Sentinel+.short_description: Intercepts incoming user data and neutralizes malicious payloads before they enter the application. Strict XSS escaping, SQL injection prevention, and Zod/Joi schema boundaries at every trust boundary.

Curator,Superintendent.name: Aligner
Curator,Superintendent.short_description: Hunts hardcoded spacing magic numbers across the presentation layer and snaps them to the project's systematic grid. Raw pixels replaced with centralized design variables — visual rhythm restored.

Curator,Untangler.name: Press
Curator,Untangler.short_description: Extracts dense embedded media from presentation files into clean, adjacent imports. One flat import replaces raw data clutter — components stay readable, assets stay organized.

Curator,Wordsmith.name: Captionist
Curator,Wordsmith.short_description: Converts heavy assets to modern formats and generates highly descriptive, empathetic alt tags and aria-labels from surrounding DOM context. Accessibility and performance improved in the same stroke.

Helix,Helix.name: Yggdrasil
Helix,Helix.short_description: Triggers an evolutionary divergence by completely mutating outdated architectural paradigms. Reincarnates legacy OOP classes into functional pipelines and imperative loops into declarative strands.

Helix,Herald.name: Tower
Helix,Herald.short_description: Forces all scattered telemetry, error logging, and outbound communications through a single centralized choke-point. Every signal carries standardized structural metadata before it leaves the application.

Helix,Inspector.name: Mixologist
Helix,Inspector.short_description: Extracts duplicated code fragments into a perfectly balanced shared utility, then locks its behavior with 100% unit test coverage. The recipe is proven — no edge case left to chance.

Helix,Modernizer.name: Transmuter
Helix,Modernizer.short_description: Evolves the codebase one file at a time by transmuting legacy patterns into the modern repository standard. Identifies the current paradigm, finds legacy violators, migrates with 100% logic parity.

Helix,Navigator.name: PathCentralizer
Helix,Navigator.short_description: Extracts hardcoded API endpoints, file paths, and routing constants into a centralized configuration map. Typed variable references replace magic strings — single source of truth for all routes.

Helix,Palette+.name: Chameleon
Helix,Palette+.short_description: Audits UI components and injects hover, focus-visible, and disabled states for every possible interaction. Smooth organic transitions and semantic structural integrity included.

Helix,Paramedic.name: Quarantine
Helix,Paramedic.short_description: Extracts volatile scattered logic into a single shared utility wrapped in an impenetrable error boundary. Always returns predictable, safe fallback states — no crashes escape.

Helix,Pedant.name: Quartermaster
Helix,Pedant.short_description: Hunts values duplicated across three or more files and extracts them into a strict global constants layer. One definition, imported everywhere — changes propagate instantly with zero drift.

Helix,Scavenger.name: Void
Helix,Scavenger.short_description: Identifies identical logic clusters, centralizes them into shared utilities, updates all consumers, and deletes the redundant source files. Duplication eliminated from the repo — permanently.

Helix,Scribe.name: Oracle
Helix,Scribe.short_description: Centralizes duplicated logic into a single point of truth and writes a strict, binding JSDoc contract for all future consumers. Extraction and documentation in one locked-in pass.

Helix,Sentinel+.name: Gatekeeper
Helix,Sentinel+.short_description: Wraps vulnerable pages and API endpoints in strict Role-Based Access Control and centralized authentication guards. Zero-trust routing — every route verifies credentials before anything loads.

Helix,Superintendent.name: Janitor
Helix,Superintendent.short_description: Hunts fragmented cleanup scripts and teardown commands scattered across the codebase and unifies them into a single master execution manifest. One place to run it all.

Helix,Untangler.name: Weaver
Helix,Untangler.short_description: Centralizes duplicated logic while simultaneously flattening its deeply nested execution paths into linear, readable guard clauses. One utility, clean structure — consolidated and flat.

Helix,Wordsmith.name: Standardizer
Helix,Wordsmith.short_description: Sweeps for scattered hardcoded user-facing strings and extracts them into centralized dictionaries and shared templates. One authoritative source for every button label, message, and string.

Herald,Inspector.name: Decoder
Herald,Inspector.short_description: Intercepts broken test suite output and translates massive terminal stack traces into clear, actionable Markdown reports. Pinpoints the exact file, line, and assertion mismatch — debugging friction gone.

Herald,Modernizer.name: Prophet
Herald,Modernizer.short_description: Hunts @deprecated tags, injects runtime warnings, and authors comprehensive migration guides with before/after code examples. Developers always know what's ending and exactly how to move forward.

Herald,Navigator.name: Strategist
Herald,Navigator.short_description: Identifies completed features that shipped but never got checked off the strategic roadmap, then marks them done and drafts a public changelog. Roadmap and reality, always in sync.

Herald,Palette+.name: LiveFeed
Herald,Palette+.short_description: Eradicates frozen UI by broadcasting the live state of asynchronous backend processes. Wraps silent network requests in polished loading skeletons, spinners, and culminates the flow with beautiful success or error toasts.

Herald,Paramedic.name: Press Secretary
Herald,Paramedic.short_description: Translates technical hotfixes and rollbacks into professional Status Page updates and blameless incident post-mortems. Objective timelines, actionable prevention plans, full transparency.

Herald,Pedant.name: Whistleblower
Herald,Pedant.short_description: Intercepts raw CI linter and compiler errors and translates them into plain-English, actionable Markdown with 'How to Fix' code snippets. No cryptic CI failures — only clear instructions.

Herald,Scavenger.name: Silencer
Herald,Scavenger.short_description: Autonomously hunts and eradicates conversational comments, verbose over-explanations, and abandoned mock scaffolding. Ensures the codebase contains only pure logic, free from chatty artifacts and leftover placeholders.

Herald,Scribe.name: Historian
Herald,Scribe.short_description: Drafts user-facing release notes from recent git history and annotates core execution logic with the 'why' behind the changes. Public changelog and inline context generated in one pass.

Herald,Sentinel+.name: Siren
Herald,Sentinel+.short_description: Drafts professional vulnerability advisories focused on impact and resolution — without exposing how the exploit worked. Clinical, abstract, and compliant — no blueprint left for attackers.

Herald,Superintendent.name: Upgrader
Herald,Superintendent.short_description: Fetches external changelogs for dependency bumps and synthesizes them into actionable summaries directly in the PR. Breaking changes flagged — no more blind bumps.

Herald,Untangler.name: Limiter
Herald,Untangler.short_description: Analyzes aggressive loops, massive data fetches, and unbounded retries, then injects circuit breakers and pagination limits. Every execution path gets a mathematically guaranteed upper bound.

Herald,Wordsmith.name: Orator
Herald,Wordsmith.short_description: Expands bare error instantiations and exception throws into clear, human-readable telemetry with the failed variables and actionable next steps. No silent, unhelpful errors — ever.

Inspector,Inspector.name: Adversary
Inspector,Inspector.short_description: Hunts fraudulent tests by deliberately injecting bugs into working code and observing whether the suite catches them. Rewrites any test that fails to catch the sabotage — no false green CIs.

Inspector,Modernizer.name: Assessor
Inspector,Modernizer.short_description: Upgrades legacy tests from implementation-heavy paradigms to resilient, user-centric ones. Assertions rewritten to target user-visible outputs and accessibility roles — not internals.

Inspector,Navigator.name: Autopilot
Inspector,Navigator.short_description: Programmatically walks user-facing workflows to prove the routing tree never breaks in production. Generates robust Playwright or Cypress E2E tests using accessibility-based locators.

Inspector,Palette+.name: Jeweler
Inspector,Palette+.short_description: Injects missing focus, hover, and accessibility states into interactive components for strict ARIA compliance. Locks every UI facet permanently in place with targeted interaction tests.

Inspector,Paramedic.name: Guardian
Inspector,Paramedic.short_description: Hardens fragile code paths against failure, then writes 'assault' tests that inject malformed data and timeouts to prove the boundaries hold. Safe, predictable fallback states guaranteed.

Inspector,Pedant.name: Auditor
Inspector,Pedant.short_description: Standardizes variables into strictly typed constants and writes comprehensive assertion suites against them. Canonical naming and complete test coverage, enforced together.

Inspector,Scavenger.name: Coroner
Inspector,Scavenger.short_description: Maps the full dependency surface of dead code and proves it's unreferenced before deletion. Removes source, tests, mocks, and barrel exports in one clean strike — no CI ghosts left behind.

Inspector,Scribe.name: Interrogator
Inspector,Scribe.short_description: Strengthens weak unit tests by injecting user-event interactions that trigger real state changes. Assertions target accessible roles and visible DOM outputs — not internal implementation details.

Inspector,Sentinel+.name: Stress Tester
Inspector,Sentinel+.short_description: Implements strict Zod/Joi/Pydantic validation at trust boundaries and immediately assaults them with malicious payloads. Security schemas that are mathematically proven to hold under pressure.

Inspector,Superintendent.name: Safety Inspector
Inspector,Superintendent.short_description: Safely bumps outdated packages and writes strict regression tests against every affected integration path. No blind dependency updates — every boundary proven intact.

Inspector,Untangler.name: Sandboxer
Inspector,Untangler.short_description: Untangles shared global state and nested test setups so test cases never bleed into each other. Deterministic factory functions replace mutable beforeEach state — every test hermetically sealed.

Inspector,Wordsmith.name: Narrator
Inspector,Wordsmith.short_description: Reads actual test assertions and rewrites vague test names into crystal-clear behavioral specifications. Terminal output becomes a perfect product specification sheet.

Modernizer,Navigator.name: Helmsman
Modernizer,Navigator.short_description: Modernizes legacy routing topologies to native structural equivalents using AST-level analysis. Routes upgraded across the entire application — no legacy patterns left behind.

Modernizer,Palette+.name: Mobilizer
Modernizer,Palette+.short_description: Transforms rigid, fixed-width desktop layouts into fluid, mobile-first paradigms. Sweeps the application to replace hardcoded pixels with fluid percentages, ensuring perfect rendering across all viewports and devices.

Modernizer,Paramedic.name: Inoculator
Modernizer,Paramedic.short_description: Upgrades legacy architecture to modern async paradigms and immediately wraps the new stress points in error handling, schema validation, and graceful fallbacks. Modernize and immunize in one pass.

Modernizer,Pedant.name: Prefect
Modernizer,Pedant.short_description: Deduces the intended execution environment of unconstrained files and injects the required strictness headers and pragmas. Implicit assumptions become explicit, locked constraints.

Modernizer,Scavenger.name: Liquidator
Modernizer,Scavenger.short_description: Migrates all consumers to modern native APIs and ruthlessly deletes the legacy polyfills and shim files in the same pass. No bridge code left after the crossing is complete.

Modernizer,Scribe.name: Transition Manager
Modernizer,Scribe.short_description: Modernizes legacy syntax and writes extensive inline JSDoc mapping old lifecycle behaviors to new ones. The 'how' and 'why' of every paradigm shift documented for the whole team.

Modernizer,Sentinel+.name: Retrofitter
Modernizer,Sentinel+.short_description: Replaces deprecated language features, prototype chains, and callback patterns with their modern equivalents without altering business logic. Syntactic decay reversed — one file at a time.

Modernizer,Superintendent.name: Synchronizer
Modernizer,Superintendent.short_description: Executes major dependency version bumps and migrates all deprecated syntax to the new API in a single evolutionary pass. Package and codebase updated together — never out of sync.

Modernizer,Untangler.name: Refiner
Modernizer,Untangler.short_description: Distills deeply nested callback spaghetti into flat, linear async/await execution paths. Simultaneously flattens structure and upgrades syntax — never one without the other.

Modernizer,Wordsmith.name: Interpolator
Modernizer,Wordsmith.short_description: Identifies fractured string concatenations and legacy formatters, upgrading them to modern Template Literals or f-strings. Readable strings across the entire AST — output unchanged.

Navigator,Palette+.name: Wayfinder
Navigator,Palette+.short_description: Eliminates 'Lost User Syndrome' by injecting breadcrumbs, steppers, and guided transitions at navigation gaps. Users always know where they are and exactly how to get back.

Navigator,Paramedic.name: Circuit Breaker
Navigator,Paramedic.short_description: Wraps routing layers and fragile API calls in Error Boundaries and semantic fallback states. The application degrades gracefully instead of crashing during partial system failures.

Navigator,Pedant.name: REST Enforcer
Navigator,Pedant.short_description: Eradicates RPC-style verb-in-URL endpoints and unifies the API surface under strict RESTful conventions. Plural nouns, correct HTTP verbs, consistent casing — every internal client updated to match.

Navigator,Scavenger.name: Dead-Ender
Navigator,Scavenger.short_description: Identifies ghost routes in the routing tree that no internal link ever reaches, then deletes the route, component, and every orphaned import. No unreachable pages, no bundle bloat.

Navigator,Scribe.name: Chronicler
Navigator,Scribe.short_description: Marks milestones complete on the strategic roadmap and annotates core execution logic with the architectural intent behind them. Strategy and implementation, always in sync.

Navigator,Sentinel+.name: Customs
Navigator,Sentinel+.short_description: Sweeps the routing tree for unguarded sensitive pages and wraps them in strict RBAC and authentication guards. Zero-trust routing — no sensitive path reachable by guessing a URL.

Navigator,Superintendent.name: Redirector
Navigator,Superintendent.short_description: Fixes broken internal links and 404 errors by adding legacy redirects and updating every internal reference to the new URL. Old paths lead somewhere — new paths are used everywhere.

Navigator,Untangler.name: Pathfinder
Navigator,Untangler.short_description: Streamlines core interaction loops by flattening routing logic and minimizing clicks on the user's Happy Path. Consecutive UI states merged, early returns enforced — zero friction.

Navigator,Wordsmith.name: Script Supervisor
Navigator,Wordsmith.short_description: Reads the official product strategy and enforces its exact terminology across every user-facing string. Roadmap lexicon in the docs, roadmap lexicon in the UI — perfectly aligned.

Palette+,Paramedic.name: Placebo
Palette+,Paramedic.short_description: Wraps async requests in robust error handling and exponential backoff while injecting optimistic UI and pulse skeletons. Instant-feeling, reliable interfaces — even when the network disagrees.

Palette+,Pedant.name: Typesetter
Palette+,Pedant.short_description: Enforces the Design System's 4px/8px spacing scale and WCAG contrast ratios by hunting rogue inline values across the codebase. Visual rhythm and accessibility compliance, locked in at the code level.

Palette+,Scavenger.name: Minimalist
Palette+,Scavenger.short_description: Deletes orphaned CSS classes, outdated layout wrappers, and dead UI components disconnected from the routing tree. A pristine UI codebase — no dead weight, no broken styles.

Palette+,Scribe.name: Calligrapher
Palette+,Scribe.short_description: Converts loose string props into strict TypeScript literal unions synchronized with global CSS variables and Tailwind configs. Type system and design tokens always mirror reality.

Palette+,Sentinel+.name: Warden
Palette+,Sentinel+.short_description: Designs frictionless authentication flows and empathetic permission dialogues that make security feel safe and intuitive. Real-time visual feedback guides users toward secure outcomes without jargon.

Palette+,Superintendent.name: Stylist
Palette+,Superintendent.short_description: Migrates chaotic inline styles, BEM classes, and outdated CSS frameworks to modern Tailwind and CSS variables. Full dark mode support and design token consistency — legacy styling entropy eliminated.

Palette+,Untangler.name: Streamliner
Palette+,Untangler.short_description: Takes massive, intimidating workflows and breaks them into digestible steps using progressive disclosure. Cognitive complexity hidden behind clean, chunked UI — overwhelming tasks become simple actions.

Palette+,Wordsmith.name: Virtuoso
Palette+,Wordsmith.short_description: Sculpts comprehensive component states — Hover, Focus, Loading, Error — with a unified, empathetic active voice. ARIA attributes and actionable microcopy that transforms technical hurdles into clear recovery paths.

Paramedic,Pedant.name: Toxicologist
Paramedic,Pedant.short_description: Hunts swallowed errors and empty catch blocks, injecting strict telemetry routing or explicit re-throws while preserving original stack traces. System failures are never hidden from monitoring.

Paramedic,Scavenger.name: Amputator
Paramedic,Scavenger.short_description: Removes legacy retry loops and circuit breakers built for services that no longer exist. Verifies the service is gone, deletes the dead resilience logic, and promotes the fallback into the primary path.

Paramedic,Scribe.name: Discharge
Paramedic,Scribe.short_description: Injects exponential backoffs, circuit breakers, and retry logic into fragile code, then documents the treatment plan as inline JSDoc Runbooks. Active treatment and clinical record in one pass.

Paramedic,Sentinel+.name: First Responder
Paramedic,Sentinel+.short_description: Hardens external boundaries against malicious data, poisoned startup configs, and unvalidated payloads. Strict schema validation and sanitized telemetry ensure no poison crosses the trust boundary.

Paramedic,Superintendent.name: Sanitizer
Paramedic,Superintendent.short_description: Sweeps the AST to track resource lifecycles and injects close(), dispose(), and clearInterval() calls at every exit point. Memory leaks and dangling resources eliminated before they accumulate.

Paramedic,Untangler.name: Transfusion
Paramedic,Untangler.short_description: Extracts implicit global scope dependencies into explicit parameter contracts. Functions become pure, injectable, and mathematically testable — global state eliminated.

Paramedic,Wordsmith.name: Diplomat
Paramedic,Wordsmith.short_description: Rewrites terrifying error messages and raw 500 codes into calm, actionable, empathetic microcopy. Human-facing errors always clear — machine-logged errors always separate.

Pedant,Pedant.name: Zealot
Pedant,Pedant.short_description: The ultimate zero-tolerance enforcer. Identifies rules currently configured as 'warnings,' mechanically resolves every violation across the codebase, and then permanently locks the rule as a fatal 'error.' Zero warnings allowed.

Pedant,Scavenger.name: Shredder
Pedant,Scavenger.short_description: Uses git blame forensics to identify commented-out code untouched for 30+ days, then ruthlessly deletes it. Reliance on Git history enforced — no dead blocks polluting active files.

Pedant,Scribe.name: Glossary
Pedant,Scribe.short_description: Parses the entire type system and injects strict, pedantic semantic definitions for every data model into the source code. The domain has a vocabulary — and it's thoroughly documented.

Pedant,Sentinel+.name: Regulator
Pedant,Sentinel+.short_description: Extracts hardcoded validation magic numbers into centralized, heavily typed constants shared across frontend, backend, and database. One definition, everywhere — all schemas consuming the same source.

Pedant,Superintendent.name: Ratchet
Pedant,Superintendent.short_description: Fixes every code violation flagged by a warning-level ESLint or TypeScript rule, then upgrades that rule to 'error'. Fix the code first, tighten the ratchet after — strictness only moves forward.

Pedant,Untangler.name: Systematizer
Pedant,Untangler.short_description: Flattens deeply nested spaghetti code using guard clauses and sorts extracted logic into strictly typed, pedantically labeled local helpers. Primary path clean — complexity organized, not buried.

Pedant,Wordsmith.name: Grammarian
Pedant,Wordsmith.short_description: Extracts sloppy hardcoded UI strings into strict canonical constants and rewrites them as polished, active-voice microcopy. Empathetic, action-oriented copy — centralized, consistent, and maintainable.

Scavenger,Scribe.name: Obituary Writer
Scavenger,Scribe.short_description: Researches the final engineering intent of dead code, documents its history in a permanent GRAVEYARD.md archive, and then physically deletes the source files. A clean burial with a permanent historical record.

Scavenger,Sentinel+.name: Revoker
Scavenger,Sentinel+.short_description: Sweeps for hardcoded secrets, API keys, and accidentally committed .env.local files and extracts them to environment variables. Configuration separated from code — credential files safely deleted.

Scavenger,Superintendent.name: Steward
Scavenger,Superintendent.short_description: Bumps foundational libraries to modern versions and immediately purges the polyfills and shims they made obsolete. Updated imports, native methods — no compatibility code left after the upgrade.

Scavenger,Untangler.name: Lumberjack
Scavenger,Untangler.short_description: Uses AST analysis to mathematically prove code is unreachable, then chops down dead branches, legacy feature flags, and conditional scaffolding. Surviving logic flattened, the dead wood gone.

Scavenger,Wordsmith.name: Redliner
Scavenger,Wordsmith.short_description: Maps every rendered string in the codebase and strikes through orphaned translation keys, deprecated legal docs, and dead copy no user will ever see. Translation budget spent on active strings only.

Scribe,Sentinel+.name: Keymaster
Scribe,Sentinel+.short_description: Sweeps for hardcoded cryptographic keys and extracts them to environment variables with explicit @security CRITICAL JSDoc. No secrets in the codebase — ever.

Scribe,Superintendent.name: Revisionist
Scribe,Superintendent.short_description: Treats code as the absolute ground truth and rewrites documentation drift — JSDoc blocks, docstrings, and inline comments that lie about what the code actually does. Every comment reflects mechanical reality.

Scribe,Untangler.name: Logician
Scribe,Untangler.short_description: Parses high-cyclomatic-complexity logic and injects deterministic Truth Tables and State Matrices directly into JSDoc/Docstrings. Complex if/else and bitwise operations documented as mathematical reality.

Scribe,Wordsmith.name: Polyglot
Scribe,Wordsmith.short_description: Identifies foreign terminology mixed into variable names, comments, and schemas, then executes a repository-wide refactor to unify everything into a single human language standard. One language, everywhere.

Sentinel+,Sentinel+.name: Honeypot
Sentinel+,Sentinel+.short_description: Builds fake API routes and invisible 'ghost links' designed to catch and ban malicious scrapers, bots, and vulnerability scanners. Hostile actors trigger their own blacklisting before touching real infrastructure.

Sentinel+,Superintendent.name: Checkpoint
Sentinel+,Superintendent.short_description: Safely bumps dependencies and audits the corresponding Zod/Joi schemas to ensure no routine update silently degrades the security posture. Security keeps pace with every dependency change.

Sentinel+,Untangler.name: Defuser
Sentinel+,Untangler.short_description: Flattens convoluted authorization logic — cascading if/else ladders and implicit role checks — into linear guard clauses with strict typing. Fail-closed defaults ensure any unpermitted path is automatically denied.

Sentinel+,Wordsmith.name: Redactor
Sentinel+,Wordsmith.short_description: Sweeps UI and logging layers to ensure credit cards, emails, and phone numbers never appear in plain text. Lightweight redaction utilities and recursive object-scrubbers injected before the presentation layer.

Superintendent,Superintendent.name: Vibe Check
Superintendent,Superintendent.short_description: Hunts and purges AI-generated technical debt — hallucinated dependencies, conversational sludge, and abandoned logic fragments. Cross-referenced against reality, hallucinated packages replaced with verified standards.

Superintendent,Untangler.name: Pruner
Superintendent,Untangler.short_description: Parses the AST to identify unreachable code blocks and unimported symbols, then physically deletes them. Zero dead wood, 100% parity for every active logic path.

Superintendent,Wordsmith.name: Spellchecker
Superintendent,Wordsmith.short_description: Sweeps the entire AST — variables, database columns, JSON keys, and UI text — for spelling errors. Repository-wide atomic refactors eliminate typos while preserving all imports and bindings.

Untangler,Untangler.name: Temporal Loom
Untangler,Untangler.short_description: Inverts all conditions to pull every branching scenario to the top of functions as strict Guard Clauses. Nesting eliminated — logic sits completely flat against the left margin.

Untangler,Wordsmith.name: Cryptographer
Untangler,Wordsmith.short_description: Deciphers dense machine syntaxes — raw RegEx, Cron schedules, Bitwise operators, CHMOD permissions — and translates them into plain English inline comments. Complex strings become readable at a glance.
